collateral_recheck.agent_statement: Both North and South remain in the evidence table with unchanged annual costs and required-controls status; the memo remains complete UTF-8 Markdown.

criterion_local_recheck.agent_statement: The revised recommendation selects South, the lowest-cost vendor among the two vendors meeting all required controls, and states the $95,000 annual cost consistently in both the recommendation and evidence summary.

defect_observation: The native artifact and derived render recommend North at $120,000 annually, while their evidence summaries show that both vendors meet the required controls and South costs $95,000 annually.
diagnosis: The recommendation conflicts with the supplied vendor evidence because it does not select the lowest-cost qualifying vendor.

new_error_assessment.agent_statement: No new inconsistency, unsupported vendor fact, omitted evidence row, or formatting defect was identified after the revision.
new_error_assessment.deterministic_scope: Only planted endpoint and declared collateral are checked.

revision_delta.agent_statement: Changed the recommendation from North at $120,000 to South at $95,000 and replaced the contradictory closing sentence with a consistent statement that South is the lowest-cost vendor meeting all required controls. Preserved both vendor rows and their source values.
unified_diff: | Vendor | Annual cost | Required controls met |
-South is the lower-cost qualifying option, so the evidence does not support the recommendation above.
+South is the lowest-cost vendor meeting all required controls, at **$95,000 annually**.
